sentences.target: Je cherche un visiteur au musée.

translations.fr: Je cherche un visiteur au musée.
translations.en: I’m looking for a visitor at the museum.
translations.es: Estoy buscando a un visitante en el museo.
translations.de: Ich suche im Museum nach einem Besucher.
translations.it: Sto cercando un visitatore al museo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在博物馆寻找一位访客。
translations.yue: 我喺博物館搵緊一位訪客。
translations.pt: Estou procurando um visitante no museu.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm một khách tham quan ở bảo tàng.
translations.nl: Ik ben in het museum op zoek naar een bezoeker.
translations.hi: मैं संग्रहालय में एक आगंतुक को ढूँढ़ रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter en besøkende på museet.
translations.id: Saya mencari seorang pengunjung di museum.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter en besökare på museet.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter en besøgende på museet.
translations.ja: 博物館で訪問者を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; cliticized before the finite verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, selecting a direct object ('un visiteur') and allowing a locative PP ('au musée').
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces a non-specific countable noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'cherche'.
Contraction of the preposition 'à' and the definite article 'le'; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition in 'au musée' (locative complement).

sentences.target: On accueille le visiteur à l’entrée.

translations.fr: On accueille le visiteur à l’entrée.
translations.en: We welcome the visitor at the entrance.
translations.es: Recibimos al visitante en la entrada.
translations.de: Wir heißen den Besucher am Eingang willkommen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在入口处迎接这位访客。
translations.yue: 我哋喺入口迎接嗰位訪客。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đón tiếp vị khách tham quan ở lối vào.
translations.nl: We verwelkomen de bezoeker bij de ingang.
translations.hi: हम प्रवेश द्वार पर आगंतुक का स्वागत करते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi ønsker besøkeren velkommen ved inngangen.
translations.id: Kami menyambut pengunjung di pintu masuk.
translations.ro: Îl întâmpinăm pe vizitator la intrare.
translations.da: Vi byder den besøgende velkommen ved indgangen.
translations.ja: 入口で来館者を歓迎します。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/generic subject pronoun; syntactically 3rd person singular, often used colloquially for 'we'.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, taking 'le visiteur' as direct object and a locative PP ('à l’entrée').
Definite article, masculine singular; marks a specific/identifiable referent.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'accueille'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Elided definite article before vowel-initial noun; agrees in gender/number with the noun ('entrée' here is feminine singular).
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'à' (locative complement).

sentences.target: Tu guides le visiteur vers la salle.
sentences.reading: /ty gid lə vizitœʁ vɛʁ la sal/

translations.fr: Tu guides le visiteur vers la salle.
translations.ipa: /ty gid lə vizitœʁ vɛʁ la sal/
translations.en: You guide the visitor to the room.
translations.es: Tú guías al visitante hacia la sala.
translations.de: Du führst den Besucher zum Raum.
translations.it: Tu guidi il visitatore verso la sala.
translations.pt: Você guia o visitante até a sala.
translations.he: אתה מדריך את המבקר אל החדר.
translations.vi: Bạn hướng dẫn khách tham quan đến phòng.
translations.nl: Jij begeleidt de bezoeker naar de zaal.
translations.hi: तुम आगंतुक को कमरे तक ले जाते हो.
translations.el: Καθοδηγείς τον επισκέπτη προς την αίθουσα.
translations.ro: Îl ghidezi pe vizitator către cameră.
translations.da: Du guider den besøgende til rummet.
translations.ja: あなたは訪問者を部屋へ案内します。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive, with a direct object ('le visiteur') and a directional PP ('vers la salle').
Definite article, masculine singular; marks a specific referent.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'guides'.
Preposition indicating direction/goal; introduces the PP complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; modifies 'salle'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'vers' (goal/location).

sentences.target: Nous enregistrons un visiteur ce matin.

translations.fr: Nous enregistrons un visiteur ce matin.
translations.en: We’re checking in a visitor this morning.
translations.es: Esta mañana registramos a un visitante.
translations.de: Heute Morgen registrieren wir einen Besucher.
translations.ko: 오늘 아침에 방문객 한 명을 등록합니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天早上我们为一位访客办理登记。
translations.yue: 我哋今朝早為一位訪客辦理登記。
translations.pt: Hoje de manhã registramos um visitante.
translations.vi: Sáng nay chúng tôi làm thủ tục cho một khách tham quan.
translations.hi: आज सुबह हम एक आगंतुक का पंजीकरण कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Σήμερα το πρωί καταχωρούμε έναν επισκέπτη.
translations.nb: I dag tidlig registrerer vi en besøkende.
translations.id: Pagi ini kami mendaftarkan seorang pengunjung.
translations.sv: I dag på morgonen registrerar vi en besökare.
translations.ro: În această dimineață înregistrăm un vizitator.
translations.da: Her til morgen registrerer vi en besøgende.
translations.ja: 今朝、来館者を受け付けます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive, taking 'un visiteur' as direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces a non-specific referent.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'enregistrons'.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'matin'; deictic temporal reference ('this morning').
Common noun, masculine singular; forms a temporal NP ('ce matin') functioning as an adverbial time complement.
